opening_positions.statement: I cannot agree responsibly until I can see the expense picture clearly enough to know what I am being asked to cover.
We need a calmer way to share records and summarize expenses before either of us treats reimbursement expectations as settled.

open_missing_info: What shared expense records and account summaries are available for review before reimbursement expectations are set?
What document-sharing and written summary process would let both parents review the expense picture before reimbursement expectations are finalized?
